title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement

---

## Problem / 问题背景

<!-- Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it clearly. -->
<!-- 这个功能建议是否源于某个问题？请清晰描述。 -->
<!-- e.g. I find it hard to compare DoH and DoH3 results side by side... -->
<!-- 例如：我发现很难直观地对比 DoH 和 DoH3 的测试结果…… -->

## Proposed solution / 建议方案

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want. -->
<!-- 清晰简洁地描述你希望增加的功能或改动。 -->

## Alternatives considered / 已考虑的替代方案

<!-- Any alternative approaches or workarounds you have already tried or thought about. -->
<!-- 你已经尝试或考虑过的其他解决方式。 -->

## Additional context / 补充信息

<!-- Any other context, screenshots, or examples that help explain the request. -->
<!-- 其他有助于说明该功能的背景信息、截图或示例。 -->
